debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
A : Finset ι
m : ℕ
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace Ω
μ : Measure Ω
inst✝² : IsFiniteMeasure μ
mE : MeasurableSpace E
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
X : ι → Ω → E
iIndepFun_X : iIndepFun X μ
integral_X : ∀ (i : ι), ∫ (ω : Ω), X i ω ∂μ = 0
memLp_X : ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X i) (2 * ↑m) μ
X₁ : ι → Ω × Ω → E := ⋯
X₂ : ι → Ω × Ω → E := ⋯
X' : ι → Ω × Ω → E := ⋯
this : DecidableEq ι
⊢ ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X' i) (2 * ↑m) (μ.prod μ)

failed_attempts:
(by
        intro i hiA
        have h1 : MemLp (X₁ i) (2 * m) (μ.prod μ) := by
          simpa [X₁] using (memLp_X i hiA).comp_measurable (measurable_fst : Measurable (Prod.fst))
        have h2 : MemLp (X₂ i) (2 * m) (μ.prod μ) := by
          simpa [X₂] using (memLp_X i hiA).comp_measurable (measurable_snd : Measurable (Prod.snd))
        simpa [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg] using h1.add h2.neg)

(by
        intro i hiA
        have h1 : MemLp (X₁ i) (2 * m) (μ.prod μ) := (memLp_X i hiA).comp_measurable (by
          simpa [X₁] using measurable_fst)
        have h2 : MemLp (X₂ i) (2 * m) (μ.prod μ) := (memLp_X i hiA).comp_measurable (by
          simpa [X₂] using measurable_snd)
        simpa [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg] using h1.add h2.neg)

(by

        have h1 : MemLp (X₁ i) (2 * m) (μ.prod μ) := (memLp_X i hiA).comp_measurePreserving

        have h2 : MemLp (X₂ i) (2 * m) (μ.prod μ) := (memLp_X i hiA).comp_measurePreserving
          (MeasurePreserving.snd (μ := μ) (ν := μ))
        simpa [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg] using h1.add h2.neg)
